description: Visual analytics for expense patterns using Recharts. Pie/donut chart for category breakdown, bar chart for 6-month trends, top categories with progress bars, and month selector for navigating between periods.

subDeliverables.title: Category breakdown pie/donut chart
subDeliverables.description: Pie or donut chart showing expense distribution by category for the selected month. Displays percentage and absolute amount per slice.
acceptanceCriteria: Chart renders with one slice per spending category
Each slice shows percentage and amount on hover/tap

subDeliverables.title: 6-month trend bar chart
subDeliverables.description: Bar chart showing total monthly spending for the current month and 5 previous months, revealing spending trends over time.

subDeliverables.title: Top categories with progress bars
subDeliverables.description: Ranked list of categories by spending amount with progress bars showing each category's share of total monthly spending.
acceptanceCriteria: Categories ranked by total spend descending
Progress bar proportional to category's share

subDeliverables.title: Month selector navigation
subDeliverables.description: Previous/next month navigation allowing users to view statistics for any past month.
acceptanceCriteria: All charts and data update on month change
